channel.title: Heat Pumped Sample Wire
channel.description: Hand-written sample fixture; not a real publication.

item.title: Cold-climate heat pump installs jump 40% in northern states
item.description: Installer associations report cold-climate heat pump installations up 40% year over year across the northern tier.
item.activist:hint: supports=heat-pump-top-pick; claim=cold-climate heat pump installs are up 40% year over year in northern states

item.title: New lifecycle analysis pegs beef at 60kg CO2e per kg of protein
item.description: A new peer-reviewed lifecycle analysis confirms beef sits around 60 kg CO2e per kg of protein, far above any plant-based alternative in the diet.
item.activist:hint: supports=beef-biggest-lever; claim=a new peer-reviewed lifecycle analysis confirms beef at roughly 60kg CO2e per kg of protein
